inputs.label: Control Group Visitors
inputs.businessContext: Total number of visitors or users in the control group (A).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of visitors or users in the control group (A).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kontrol grubundaki (A) toplam ziyaretçi veya kullanıcı sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Besucher oder Nutzer in der Kontrollgruppe (A).

inputs.label: Control Group Conversions
inputs.businessContext: Number of conversions (successful actions) in the control group.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of conversions (successful actions) in the control group.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Konversionen (erfolgreiche Aktionen) in der Kontrollgruppe.

inputs.label: Variant Group Visitors
inputs.businessContext: Total number of visitors or users in the variant group (B).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of visitors or users in the variant group (B).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varyant grubundaki (B) toplam ziyaretçi veya kullanıcı sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Besucher oder Nutzer in der Variantengruppe (B).

inputs.label: Variant Group Conversions
inputs.businessContext: Number of conversions in the variant group.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of conversions in the variant group.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Konversionen in der Variantengruppe.

inputs.label: Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Required confidence level for the test (typically 90, 95, or 99).

businessContext_i18n.en: Required confidence level for the test (typically 90, 95, or 99).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Test için gereken güven seviyesi (genellikle 90, 95 veya 99).
businessContext_i18n.de: Erforderliches Konfidenzniveau für den Test (normalerweise 90, 95 oder 99).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
